dialogos.texto_en: Now that we're back, it's already evening.\nIn the end, I guess we can't go sightseeing today... I'm sorry.
Don't worry about a thing.
Yeah, you're right.\nWe experienced something even better than just sightseeing.
I-I knew we were being watched,\nbut it's a little embarrassing to hear it out loud.
So, now you can finally do some PDA, right?
I-I won't do that!
But Yotsuba,\nyou were able to properly speak to Dad\nabout everything.
That was, well...momentum?
When you saw Fu-kun,\nyou had no choice but to jump in, with all you had.
He froze up when Dad stared at him.
Thanks to that though, I didn't hesitate.
Itsuki already said it,\nbut I knew I had to say it someday as well.\nI just didn't have the chance before.
Hmm.
Yotsuba, you've grown too.
You think so?
Well I mean, you told Daddy right to his face\nthat Fu-kun had confessed to you, right?
...Yeah, I suppose.\nThat's true...
Teehee, it's silly that we were all so worried.
Yeah.\nIn the end though, Dad took all the good parts.
Huh? What do you mean?
Actually%p-2;――
Oh my goodness!\nYou guys are horrible, doing that to me!
That's just how much we were worried about you.
...But, somehow, I had a feeling that was the case.\nAlong the way, Ichika gave me some advice.
Oh, I see.
Ichika, you...
I didn't really get in the way, did I?
Yotsuba.\nI'm sorry for deceiving you.
It's okay, I'm not worried about it anymore.
I'm actually really happy.\nBecause, everyone was worried about me.
But, I'm not gonna worry about you anymore.
Wha, Nino, you're so cold.\nYou should worry even more about me!
Ah, but let's not keep any secrets, okay?
Yeah, no secrets.
...You know what? I feel like I've been able\nto let go of a lot of things on this trip.\nAnd that's all thanks to everyone, and Dad too.
I see.
But still, I can't believe Daddy actually came\nall the way to Okinawa to check up on us.
Ignoring us completely, and then\nturn around and do something like this?\nIsn't he just moving from one extreme to the next?
You think so?\nDad has always been worried about us,\nsince we were little.
Yeah, you're right.\nHe's always been watching over us.
Hm?
Oh, a message from Dad.
Whaaaa?!\nD-does this mean he still won't approve of us dating?!
I really don't think it's that.
Wait a second.\nUmmm%p-2;――
'I'm done with the conference,\nso I'm heading back early.\nHave fun tomorrow...' That's all.
Hmm, the conference, huh.
We need to have Ebata-san keep it a secret\nthat we asked about Father's plans.
Hey, Ichika.\nCan I reply to the message?
Sure, go ahead.
What are you gonna say?
That's obvious.
'I'm gonna have fun!\nFrom Yotsuba%p-2;――%p;'
And, sent!
